title: Fbmodium
description: This is a WIP mod to add Fbmodium into the world why we work on end game FBModium items.
body:
This mod will not be updated anymore

This is a WIP mod to add Fbmodium and it's variants into the world Fbmodium is a new metal type to use with silent gear. This mod adds end game items specially for Supernova Empires Modpacks but it can be used by anyone on any modpack.  This Mod adds this items:

• Fbmodium Ingot

• Block of Fbmodium

• Nether Infused Fbmodium

• Block of Nether Infused Fbmodium

• End Infused Fbmodium

• Block of End Infused Fbmodium

• Ultimate Infused Fbmodium

• Block of Ultimate Infused Fbmodium

 

To use the recipes of this mod Mekanism and Extended Crafting are needed.

[![Partners](https://i.imgur.com/5z7G7f9.png)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=2758)
